title: AE2 Lightning Tech
description: An AE2 addon that introduces a lightning energy system, advanced machines, and overloaded network components.
body:
# AE2 Lightning Tech
![Header Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f4a5c084440f3940cef3f3747348caa507a20e83.png)
AE2 Lightning Tech is an addon for Applied Energistics 2 that turns lightning into a real part of your automation chain. It adds Lightning as a ME-storable resource, builds a material progression around Overload Crystals, and expands AE2 with advanced machines and high-throughput Overloaded network infrastructure.


## Features

### Lightning System

Collect natural strikes, generate artificial lightning, and store Lightning energy inside your ME network. Lightning works as a dedicated resource used by machines, recipes, and later progression.

### Overload Materials

Progress through a new material chain based on Overload Crystals, lightning transformation, crystal growth, advanced alloys, processors, and other key components used across the mod.

### Processing Machines

Build a lightning-powered production line with machines for transformation, assembly, crystal catalysis, weather control, and high-throughput parallel processing.

### Overloaded ME Network

Upgrade your AE2 infrastructure with Overloaded network components designed for much higher channel capacity, larger pattern workflows, wireless routing, and remote machine connections.

## Dependencies

- **Required:** Applied Energistics 2

## Feedback

Bug reports and suggestions are welcome on the project issue tracker. Please include your Minecraft, NeoForge, AE2, and AE2 Lightning Tech versions when reporting problems.

## Credits

Developed by **MOAKIEE**, **CystrySU**, **gjmhmm8**, **_leng**, **TedXenon**, and **MHanHanBing**.

Special thanks to the Applied Energistics 2 team.
